title: Floweroyal 2pcs Fake Hanging Plants Fake Potted String of Pearls Succulent Plants Small Faux Plants for Indoor Outdoor Shelf Wall Decor
features: ♔VIBRANT AND ADORABLE-Our fake succulents hanging plants are made of safe high-quality plastic. Designed as fake string of pearls in black pot. Every fake plant comes with styrofoam inside that has been painted black on the top. 1 stick glued into the styrofoam with 6 tendrils. Add a nice touch of life.

♔SIZE OF SUCCULENTS PLANTS-Total length of faux string of pearls plant is about 18.5" in 3.5" x 3.1" x 2.6" black plastic pot. The pots are well balanced to keep the hanging string of pearls strands from pulling off the shelf. Each package includes 2pcs fake succulents hanging plants.

♔LONG-LASTING AND EASY TO CARE-Do not have to water and no dead plants. Easy to clean and remove the dust. Our fake plant is amazing for someone who kills real plants. Easy to store for a long time and use repeatedly.

♔WIDELY USAGE-If you need faux plants to fill the monotonous space or gives a nice finishing touch to your space. Floweroyal fake hanging plant is nice set of faux pearls plants with a lot of potential for indoor outdoor decor. You can place it in your living room, garden, coffee shop, fireplace, skylights, wall, shelf, bathroom, porch, dining room, courtyard, etc.

♔WARM TIPS-After receiving our plant, it is better to place it in a ventilated place for 1-2 days before decorating. You can combine the potted artificial succulent with a plant stand, or place the black pot in a decorative pot that suits your home decor style.
description: Product Description WIDELY USAGE FOR FAKE SUCCULENTS HANGING PLANTS REAL LOOKING AND SUPER CUTE : Designed as fake string of pearls in black plastic pot. Our fake string of pearls made of high-quality plastic. It is safe to use and has a long-lasting vitality. When you wipe the surface of succulents with a damp cloth, the color will not fade. Always keep in good looking and perky. NO MAINTENANCE REQUIRED : Compared with real plants, artificial plants are easier to arrange and clean. This hanging plant is very friendly to people who are not good at growing plants. Whether you are a busy person at work, or a person prone to allergies. It is worth trying. WIDELY USAGE : Perfect fake plants to fill your space. Set of two for indoor outdoor decor, putting in your bathroom, living room shelf or garden can bring the atmosphere of nature to your life. FLOWEROYAL ARTIFICIAL SUCCULENTS HANGING PLANTS SUCCULENTS IN POT: Approx 18.5" (47CM). STRING OF PEARLS: 1 stick glued into the styrofoam with 6 tendrils. BLACK PLASTIC PLANTER: Approx 3.5" X 3.1" X 2.6" (9CM*7.8CM*6.5CM). PACKAGE: 2pcs fake string of pearls potted plants. Note: Due to the shooting angle, the plant in the scene graph may be larger. The actual size is subject to the marked size, manual measurement may have an error of 1-2cm. PACKAGE OF FLOWEROYAL ARTIFICIAL SUCCULENTS HANGING PLANTS Although you don't need a decorative pot, as they come in a typical black plastic pot, they really look so much better in your own decorative pots to add to your decor. Due to long-term transportation, the product is sealed in a closed space, which will produce some odors. Our products are made of safe materials, please feel free to use them. At the same time, it is recommended that you place the hanging plants in a ventilated environment for 1-2 days after receiving it, the smell will gradually disappear.
